description: Created OmniFocus inbox task (Jay Liles ILP kickoff reminder) without assigning a project or tag. Task was dropped into inbox with no organizational context.
correction: All OmniFocus tasks must include a project and/or tag. Never create bare inbox tasks without organizational metadata.
systemic_fix: When creating OmniFocus tasks via AppleScript, always include project assignment and at least one tag. Check SYSTEM.md OmniFocus section for tagging conventions before creating tasks.
